sql.if: AND (b.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM tb_csm_notice a LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_admin_user b ON a.create_id = b.id LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_admin_user c ON a.modified_id = c.id WHERE 1=1

SELECT
FROM tb_csm_notice a LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_admin_user b ON a.create_id = b.id LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_admin_user c ON a.modified_id = c.id WHERE a.id=#{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_csm_notice SET modified_id=#{modifiedId},
title=#{title},
content=#{content},
display_yn=#{displayYn},
top_yn=#{topYn},
modified_date=Now() WHERE id=#{id}
